title: Vadodara's March Heat: Stay Cool!
body: Summer is here! Anjani Water delivers instant hydration for homes, offices & events in Vadodara.

title: Vadodara Summer Ready? Hydrate with Anjani Water!
body: As Vadodara's temperatures rise, stay cool and refreshed with Anjani Water. We deliver Anjani 200ml, Bisleri, and Bailley directly to your homes, offices, and events. Call 9925997750 for quick delivery across Vadodara!

title: Summer Bulk Deal – Stock Up Before the Wedding Season
body: Get special pricing on Anjani 200ml bulk orders this summer. Wedding season is here — secure your water supply now before slots fill up. Call 9925997750 for a customised quote.

title: Fresh Stock Arrived – Anjani 200ml & Bailley Now Available
body: New consignment of Anjani Premium 200ml and Bailley by Parle Agro is now in stock. Ready for immediate bulk dispatch across all Vadodara areas. WhatsApp us to confirm your order today.

title: Wedding Season Supply – Serving 50+ Events This Month
body: March–May is peak wedding season in Vadodara. Anjani Water is proud to be the official water supplier for over 50 weddings and receptions this season. Book your event supply early to guarantee availability.

title: New Corporate Office Delivery Route – Gotri & Subhanpura Added
body: We have expanded our daily office delivery route to include Gotri, Subhanpura and Sama. Corporate offices in these areas can now subscribe to weekly or monthly packaged water delivery. Contact us to set up your account.
